summary: VenuLoQ investor-ready e2e testing completed. All 12 requested features tested and verified. Landing page, venue search (desktop & mobile), venue detail page, concierge intake form, and login page all functional. All venue images load correctly (no broken images). Mock data fallback working when backend is unavailable.

landing_page_loads.details: Hero section, venue carousel, trust badges, venue categories, featured venues, how it works, testimonials, footer all visible

landing_page_carousel_images.details: 12 images in venue showcase carousel, all loading from valid Unsplash URLs

search_page_desktop.details: 20 venues displayed with images, filter sidebar (city, event type, venue type, setting, guest count, price, amenities), sort dropdown, list/map toggle

search_page_images.details: All venue card images load correctly from Unsplash (no broken images or question marks)

quick_filter_chips_mobile.details: Wedding, Corporate, Reception, Birthday chips visible and toggle correctly on mobile search

list_map_toggle_mobile.details: List (grid icon) and Map (map icon) toggles visible and functional on mobile

venue_card_navigation_search.details: Venue cards navigate to detail page correctly

venue_detail_page.details: Hero image, breadcrumb, venue stats (capacity, pricing), amenities, reviews, FAQ sections all visible

enquire_now_button.details: 'Speak to Our Venue Expert' button opens concierge intake form modal

concierge_form_step1.details: Step 1 shows Full Name, Phone Number, Email Address fields with proper labels and styling

login_page.details: Login page loads with role tabs (RM, Venue, Admin), email/password fields, demo credentials displayed

api_health_check.featured_venues: PASS - Returns venue data with valid image URLs
api_health_check.cities_endpoint: PASS - Returns 9 cities with areas and sample images

critical_code_review_comments: Code review confirms proper image handling: All image extraction handles both string and object formats (rawImg = venue.images?.[0]; img = typeof rawImg === 'string' ? rawImg : rawImg?.url)
VenueCard.js line 38-42: Proper fallback routing - uses city_slug/slug when available, falls back to venue_id
VenuePublicPage.js line 48-53: Mock data fallback when API fails - finds venue in mockVenuesData by slug
mockVenues.js: All 10 mock venues have city_slug and slug fields for proper routing
VenueSearchPage.js line 267-289: Backend health check with mock data fallback working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: VenuLoQ is investor-ready. All critical flows verified: landing page with carousel, search page (desktop & mobile), venue detail page with enquiry form, login page with role tabs. Backend returns proper city_slug and slug for SEO-friendly URLs. Mock data fallback is configured for offline scenarios.
